ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, province) */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "language_codes" TEXT /* Supported languages for the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "aqi" INTEGER /* Air Quality Index (AQI) */,
  "aqi_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the main pollutant */,
  "main_pollutant" TEXT /* Main pollutant (e.g., pm25) */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "co_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of carbon monoxide (CO) */,
  "so2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of sulfur dioxide (SO2) */,
  "no2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen dioxide (NO2) */,
  "o3_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of ozone (O3) */,
  "pm10_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of particulate matter 10 (PM10) */,
  "aqi_category" TEXT /* Category of the AQI (e.g., Good, Moderate, Unhealthy) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the air quality data (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_main_pollutant FOREIGN KEY ("main_pollutant") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., pm25) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Health impact of the pollutant */,
  "safe_limit" REAL /* Safe limit of the pollutant concentration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* ID of the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., Rain, Clear sky) */,
  "weather_desc" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather condition */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather data was collected */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index */,
  "air_pressure" REAL /* Air pressure in hPa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* ID of the location where the recommendation applies */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for sensitive groups (e.g., reduce outdoor exercise) */,
  "exercise_value" TEXT /* Value of the exercise recommendation (e.g., orange, green) */,
  "windows_desc" TEXT /* Description of the windows recommendation (e.g., close your windows) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main pollutant */,
  "sensitive_group" TEXT /* Specific sensitive group (e.g., children, elderly) */,
  "additional_tips" TEXT /* Additional tips for the sensitive group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, administrator) */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "timezone_preference" TEXT /* Preferred timezone of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Log of the user's activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
